prompt: Look at the image and describe what you see. Your description should include the main objects, their colors, and their positions.
correct_answer: A woman with long curly hair is sitting on a brown sofa and doing knitting work with blue wool. A dog is sleeping beside her on the right side of the sofa. A mobile phone is placed on the sofa between them. Behind her there are wooden shelves with some decorative items and a warm light.
alternative_answers: The image shows a woman sitting on a brown leather sofa and working with blue yarn. A dog is resting next to her and a phone is kept on the sofa. There are shelves with objects and a soft light in the background.

key_elements.animal: dog sleeping on the right side of the sofa
